untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'partial rise/decline within formation' and identification of specific chart pattern (head-and-shoulders or similar breakout formation). These pattern-recognition features are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires market regime classification (BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET) which is not in the allowed regime list (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY are available). Context-dependent direction based on pattern type cannot be operationalized with available indicators.
translation_notes: The core signal describes a technical pattern-based entry strategy (partial rise/decline before breakout) with high success rate (79%) specifically in bear markets with upward breakouts. This requires: (1) formation detection, (2) partial movement identification, (3) breakout confirmation. Exact entry/exit conditions are author-silent. Attempted approximation uses pivot breakout as proxy for formation breakout, but this does not capture the nuanced partial rise/decline entry technique or market regime context described in the original rule.
